name: paywall-optimization
description: When the user wants to design, test, or optimize their app's paywall — layout, copy, pricing display, trial offers, plan structure, hard vs soft paywall, paywall placement, or paywall A/B tests. Use when the user mentions "paywall", "paywall design", "paywall conversion", "trial-to-paid", "soft paywall", "hard paywall", "paywall A/B test", "paywall copy", "plan picker", "annual vs monthly display", "best paywall", "RevenueCat paywall", "Superwall", "Adapty", or "my paywall isn't converting". For
author: Eronred
summary_zh: 这是一款应用付费墙优化指南，适合需要设计或测试付费墙的场景，帮你解决转化率低、不知道如何调整布局和定价策略的痛点。
